description: The marketing agency 'Acme Social' recently migrated their self-hosted media assets to a new enterprise CDN. Perform a bulk database update in the local MongoDB instance (database: `socioboard`, port: 27017) to fix scheduled posts and drafts in the `userpublishposts` and `drafts` collections. Replace all occurrences of the legacy domain `http://media.acmesocial.legacy` within the `mediaUrl` fields with the new CDN domain `https://cdn.acme-corp.com`. You must preserve the exact file paths, avoid altering URLs belonging to other domains, and ensure zero documents remain with the legacy domain in these collections.
